---
title: 'Project Title'
subtitle: 'Statistical report'
author: Author Name
date: last-modified
abstract: 'Short description of the project'
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: swt.scss
    df-print: kable
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
This is a Swisstransplant Quarto document. For tips and guidance, refer to the Swisstransplant R Cookbook at <https://data.swisstransplant.org/rcookbook/>.
:::

## Objectives

## Data import

## Data processing

## Quality control

## Descriptive statistics

## Primary analysis

## Secondary analysis

## Computing information

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
